name: brain-wiz
description: Brain Wiz — local multiplayer knowledge & puzzle game

scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build:server && npm run client:build && npm run host:build
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @brain-wiz/shared && npm run build -w @brain-wiz/config && npm run build -w @brain-wiz/minigames
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:server" "npm run client:dev" "npm run host:dev"
scripts.test: npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run test:project-checks
scripts.test:project-checks: npm run build:libs && tsc && tsc-alias && cd dist && node --env-file=../.env --test
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:libs && tsc && tsc-alias && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('coverage', { recursive: true })" && cd dist && node --env-file=../.env --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=../coverage/lcov.info
scripts.test:shared: npm run build:libs && tsc && tsc-alias && cd dist/tests/shared && node --test
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
